name: filerecovery-tools
description: The filerecovery data-recovery tool, packaged for Claude Code.

plugins.name: filerecovery
plugins.description: Drive an AI agent through signature-based file carving, filesystem-aware undelete, disk imaging, and volume triage via the filerecovery MCP server, plus a skill for authoring custom carvers. Requires the `filerecovery` binary on PATH.
